description: Taking traditional designs and giving them a modern twist is what makes fastrack watches irreplaceable timepieces. This watch refuses to conform, with its stylish dial and minimalist design, backed up by a steel case for optimal performance. Wear this with trendy, casual ensembles - colour-pop tees, denims and sports shoes.Case diameter: 40 mmCase thickness: 5 mmDial shape: SquareSteel case with a fixed bezel for added durability, style and comfortRubber strap with an embossed design and a tang clasp for comfort and styleSilver, grey and red dial with branding between the 8 and 9 hour marks and brand logo between the 10 and 11 hour marksQuartz movement of time display Screw to reset timeSolid case back made of stainless steel for enhanced durabilityWater resistance up to 50 meters, allowing you to use it even when showering
